---
output: github_document
---

<!-- README.md is generated from README.Rmd. Please edit that file -->

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.path = "man/figures/README-",
  out.width = "100%"
)
```

# blockr.ai

<!-- badges: start -->
<!-- badges: end -->

## Overview

`blockr.ai` provides AI-powered functionality for the `blockr.core` framework. It enables integration with various AI services and models to enhance data analysis workflows through natural language interactions.

## Features

- AI-assisted block configuration via `ai_ctrl_block()` (discover system).
- Data exploration backends for LLM-driven analysis.
- Integration with many LLM APIs via the ellmer package.

## Installation

You can install the development version of blockr.ai from GitHub with:

```r
# install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("BristolMyersSquibb/blockr.ai")
```
